admin.title: Dashboard
admin.delete_session_confirm: Delete this session and all its scores?
admin.qr_instruction: Ask everyone to scan this code with their phone:
admin.delete_experience_confirm: Delete this activity? All slides will be permanently lost.
admin.end_show_confirm: End "{name}" now? Final scores will be shown to all {count} players.
admin.sorting_ai: Sorting with AI... this may take a moment.
admin.bulk_import_confirm: Add all {count} photos and videos as slides?
admin.silhouette_no_person: Note: No person detected in this photo
admin.silhouette_failed: No person detected. The silhouette may not work well.
admin.quiz_intro_duration_desc: Seconds the 'Quiz Time!' announcement shows before each question
admin.question_timer: Time to answer each quiz question
admin.display_duration: How long each photo stays on screen
admin.relaxed_mode_desc: No timer — players answer at their own pace
admin.show_scores_desc: Display the leaderboard after each quiz
admin.sound_effects_desc: Play sounds on the TV for timer, answers, etc.
admin.speed_scoring_desc: Faster answers earn more points (100 to 10)
admin.flat_scoring: Flat scoring (10 pts per correct answer)
admin.photos_not_available: Apple Photos is not available. Please open Photos.app and try again, or use folder import instead.
admin.photos_access_steps:
1. Open System Settings
2. Go to Privacy & Security then Photos
3. Find Terminal and set to Full Access
4. Restart this app
admin.drop_zone_text: Drag & drop photos or videos here
admin.drop_zone_hint: or click to browse — supports JPG, PNG, HEIC, MP4, MOV and more
admin.step1_subtitle: Import from a folder or Apple Photos
admin.step3_subtitle: Project on the big screen and let people join
admin.step3_hint: Pick an activity above, then press the green button.
admin.no_shows: No activities yet. Create one below!
admin.no_photos: No photos yet. Use the buttons above to add some.
admin.add_method: Choose how you want to add them
admin.create_quiz_analyze: Asking Gemini to analyze the photo...
admin.quiz_no_person: Warning: no person detected in silhouette
admin.no_media_to_import: No media to import. Add photos first.
admin.estimate_dates_desc: AI analyzes each undated photo, estimates people's ages, and cross-references with family birth years to guess the year.
admin.family_context_placeholder:
Marie born 1985
Jean born 1950
Flo born 1990
admin.no_gemini: Gemini API key required for this feature.
admin.err_code_taken: This room code is already taken. Pick a different one or leave it blank for a random code.
admin.err_code_format: The room code must be 3 to 8 characters, letters and numbers only.
admin.err_exp_missing: This activity no longer exists. It may have been deleted.
admin.err_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
admin.err_save: Could not save. Please try again.
admin.err_delete: Could not delete. Please try again.
admin.err_reset: Could not reset. Please try again.
admin.err_slide: Could not create the slide. Please try again.

player.enter_nickname: Pick a nickname for the leaderboard
player.name_error: Name must be at least 2 characters
player.waiting: Waiting for the host to start
player.room_full: This room is full (30/30 players). Please wait or ask the host.
player.room_locked: This room is locked. No new players can join.
player.answer_relaxed: Take your time — tap your answer!
player.disconnected: Connection lost. Trying to reconnect... Don't close this page.
player.room_not_found: Room not found. Check the code and try again.
player.name_too_short: Name must be at least 2 characters
player.name_taken: This name is already taken. Pick another one.
player.connection_error: Could not reach the server. Try again.

display.quiz_intro_zoom: Can you guess what this is?
